ai_summary: Birlasoft reported robust Q1 FY22 revenue growth of 4.1% QoQ and 5.9% YoY, driven by improved utilization despite operational challenges from India's severe COVID-19 second wave. However, EBITDA margins slightly declined to 16% due to higher subcontractor and hiring costs, and a notable red flag is the surge in attrition to 16.5%, reflecting industry-wide talent shortages. Management remains optimistic about leveraging pent-up demand and expects margin stability in Q2, absorbing wage hikes, with an anticipated uptick in the second half of the year.
